channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising Fuel Costs and Conflict Put Pregnant Women at Risk of Mortality in Childbirth
item.description: Maternal health leaders are warning that increasing fuel prices and the global consequences of ongoing wars are severely affecting pregnant women, particularly in crisis-hit regions. Countries such as...

item.title: Eastern Cape Easter road safety sees fewer accidents, though three crashes claim 15 lives
item.description: Over the Easter weekend, major transport routes in the Eastern Cape experienced relatively low accident levels compared to previous years. Despite the safer conditions on historically high-risk corrid...

item.title: Acting Provost Says No Lab Equipment Is Missing At Rivers State College Of Health
item.description: The Acting Provost of the Rivers State College of Health Science and Management Technology, Dr (Mrs) Peace Chigozirim Amadi, don come out openly to rubbish reports for media wey dey claim say laborato...

item.title: Firefighters Face Collapse as Blaze Engulfs Kimberly Clark Paper Warehouse in Ontario
item.description: A large fire broke out at a Kimberly Clark paper products facility in Ontario, California, early on April 7, 2026, resulting in a roof collapse and forcing firefighters to retreat. The fire started ar...

item.title: Ugandan Comedian Kansiime Shares Story of Paying Her Own Dowry
item.description: Ugandan comedian Anne Kansiime has been sharing a rather interesting story, yaani how she ended up paying her own dowry! In a throwback video that’s been doing the rounds, she explained that her then-...

item.title: Albanese in Singapore talks to secure Australia’s fuel supply amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has embarked on a critical trip to Singapore to secure fuel imports as tensions escalate in the Middle East. With oil prices spiking due to the Iranian blockade of the ...

item.title: Myleene Klass celebrates 48th birthday on snowy mountain in stylish bikini
item.description: Myleene Klass marked her 48th birthday in a snowy mountain setting, wearing a black two-piece bikini complemented by black snow boots, white ear muffs, and oversized shades. The TV presenter appeared ...

item.title: Balancing Carbon Removal and Biodiversity: How Tree Planting Can Help or Harm
item.description: Efforts to fight climate change need not only cutting carbon emissions but also removing carbon from the atmosphere. Currently, humans emit about 42 billion tonnes of CO2 each year from burning fuels ...

item.title: Lucky Montana seeks to exclude wife from joint tax liability in multimillion-rand dispute
item.description: Former Prasa CEO Lucky Montana is involved in a legal dispute with the South African Revenue Service (Sars) over a significant tax debt that has grown from R44 million to R55 million. Married in commu...

item.title: States Extend RSV Immunization Period Amid Ongoing Spread
item.description: Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) continues to spread later into the spring than usual, prompting many states to extend the immunization window for infants and toddlers. Typically, RSV season peaks in...

item.title: Kanye West expresses willingness to meet UK Jewish community following Wireless Festival backlash
item.description: Kanye West, also known as Ye, has stated his wish to meet members of the Jewish community in the United Kingdom after controversy surrounding his upcoming headline appearance at the Wireless Festival....

item.title: Marcos Reviews Excise Tax Suspension Recommendations Amid Rising Oil Prices
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. led a meeting with key Cabinet officials on April 7, 2026, to discuss recommendations regarding the possible suspension of the excise tax on petroleum product...

item.title: Pepsodent Promotes Oral Hygiene Education in 51 Nigerian Schools
item.description: For World Oral Health Day 2026, Pepsodent don intensify efforts to make Nigerian children sabi correct oral hygiene. Dem carry the campaign go 51 schools for 17 states at the same time, including big ...

item.title: Tony Incenzo Completes Visits to Every English Non-League Football Ground
item.description: Tony Incenzo has achieved a remarkable milestone in English football, completing a journey that has spanned 54 years. Beginning in 1972 with his first non-league match, Tony initially became the young...

item.title: SADC Regional Procurement System to Lower Medicine Prices and Improve Supply
item.description: The Southern African Development Community (SADC) is setting up a regional pooled procurement system to address persistent shortages of essential medicines and medical supplies. This system, called SA...

item.title: Madurai Court Awards Death Sentence to 9 Cops in 2020 Tamil Nadu Father-Son Custodial Deaths Case
item.description: The 2020 custodial deaths of P Jayaraj and his son J Bennix in Sathankulam, Thoothukudi district, Tamil Nadu, have finally reached a judicial conclusion after six years. The Central Bureau of Investig...

item.title: Two People Arrested Over Investigation Into Dezi Freeman's Movements
item.description: Two people were arrested in Victoria’s northeast on Saturday as part of an ongoing investigation into the movements of Dezi Freeman, a fugitive who was shot dead earlier this week. The pair, a man and...

item.title: Lerato Kganyago and Lawrence Maleka set to host the 2026 Metro FM Awards
item.description: The 2026 Metro FM Awards, one of South Africa's most anticipated events, will be hosted by Lerato Kganyago and Lawrence Maleka. For the first time, the prestigious award ceremony will take place at Mo...

item.title: Improving Health and Livability in African Cities
item.description: Dis wata, African cities dey face bare challenges, but dem still get capacity to function well if correct systems dey. The book 'Urban Health in Africa' explore how rapid urbanisation dey affect publi...

item.title: Researchers Develop Highly Energy-Efficient AI System
item.description: Researchers have announced a breakthrough in artificial intelligence, creating a new nanoelectronic device that significantly improves energy efficiency. The device demonstrates machine-learning class...
